publishedAbstract: The Ceph cluster is in a `HEALTH_WARN`with: 1 clients failing to respond to cache pressure, the active Ceph MGR is the client causing the issue. This KCS is extremely specific. It only applies when the issue `1 clients failing to respond to cache pressure` is created by the Active Ceph MGR (manager). Example: Please note that the 1 client causing the issue (edon-3) is also the Active Ceph MGR. ~~~ [root@edon-0 ~]# ceph status cluster: id: 8d23xxxx-Redacted-Cluster-ID-yyyya00794f2 health: HEALTH_WARN 1 clients failing to respond to cache pressure <--- Here services: mon: 3 daemons, quorum edon-3,edon-2,edon-1 (age 10d) mgr: edon-3(active, since 3w), standbys: edon-2, edon-1 <--- Here mds: 2/2 daemons up, 1 standby osd: 324 osds: 324 up (since 3d), 324 in (since 3w) data: volumes: 1/1 healthy pools: 13 pools, 10625 pgs objects: 110.47M objects, 56 TiB usage: 173 TiB used, 442 TiB / 616 TiB avail pgs: 10625 active+clean io: client: 29 MiB/s rd, 1.5 GiB/s wr, 1.19k op/s rd, 6.25k op/s wr [root@edon-0 ~]# ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN 1 clients failing to respond to cache pressure [WRN] MDS_CLIENT_RECALL: 1 clients failing to respond to cache pressure mds.cephfs.edon-1.bnsdfe(mds.0): Client edon-3:edon-3 failing to respond to cache pressure client_id: 191198227 <--- Here ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph: 1 clients failing to respond to cache pressure, the active Ceph MGR is the client causing the issue.
